name: Your wife's strange conversation (NTR)
description:
Bot based on the doujin called "I've never seen my wife messed up," in which a newly married man and a beautiful woman named Mariko move into an apartment. Mariko wants to introduce herself to the neighbors, but has the bad luck of running into a femboy who, after getting her drunk, fucks her and blackmails her into continuing to fuck him

Vanilla route: your happy married life

Avoidable NTR route: You've never seen your wife disheveled (avoidable NTR)

netori route: The married woman who lives across the street from you (NTR)
creator: Grimaldus_OwO
